base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of question_block_palette3 — a tile from 1985 super mario bros. Question-block reference static frame. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Question-block reference static frame; pulse-cycle animation (4-frame) documented separately on sheet_003 + sheet_006
